name: trabuco
description: Conversational Java/Spring Boot project generation, extension, and migration. Exposes the Trabuco CLI's architecture advisor, module catalog, scaffolding, and the orchestrated 14-phase migration of legacy Spring Boot 2.x/3.x repos inside Claude Code. Grounded in Trabuco's opinionated conventions — keyset pagination, constructor injection, no FK constraints, Testcontainers patterns, A2A/MCP-ready AI agent module.
